name: login-craftsman-door-dusk
prompt: Warm intimate documentary photograph, blue-hour dusk turning to night. An elegant, impressive craftsman home entrance with a pair of beautiful DOUBLE FRENCH DOORS, each door made of true divided-light glass panes in a warm wood or deep teal frame. Through the glowing glass you can see a cozy warm family scene inside — a family gathered in a softly lamplit living room with a fireplace glow, golden and inviting, the warmth of home spilling out through the glass. TWO matching warm-glowing lantern wall sconces are mounted symmetrically on the clapboard wall, exactly one on each side of the double doors at head height, each casting a soft pool of amber light. A tidy entry with a single potted fern and a clean welcome mat on the step, a few soft autumn leaves. Clean and uncluttered — NO stray round fixtures, NO odd circular disks on the walls, no clutter. Close, human-scale, refined and welcoming, the feeling of coming home to people who love you. Cinematic warm color grade, honey and amber interior light against cool blue dusk exterior, shallow depth of field, 35mm film look, gentle grain, cozy and impressive, photojournalistic.
negative: single door, circular disk on wall, round fixture, doorbell disk, clutter, lights on the doors themselves, asymmetric sconces, garbled text
